er_payload_too_large: Recording is too large. Please try a shorter clip.

affiliate_page_subtitle: Refer friends and earn 30 extra days for each subscription
auth_check_email_delivery_hint: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder and make sure the address above is correct. If you need to change your email, sign up again.

auth_check_email_sent_to: We sent a confirmation link to
auth_check_email_success_resent: Email resent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth_login_browser_hint: Sign in or create your account in the browser. When finished, you'll return to the app automatically.
auth_browser_fallback_hint: After you sign in in the browser, we'll try to bring you back to the app automatically.
auth_browser_fallback_paste: If that doesn't happen, paste the authentication code shown in the browser below.
auth_browser_token_placeholder: Paste the code from the browser
auth_browser_token_invalid: Paste the authentication code shown in the browser.
auth_browser_token_failed: We couldn't complete authentication with this code.
auth_browser_launch_failed: We couldn't open the browser sign-in flow.
auth_env_web_url_missing: VITE_WEB_URL is not configured. Set it in apps/desktop/.env.
dictionary_snippet_empty_subtitle: Create trigger phrases that expand automatically in transcription
dictionary_snippet_modal_description: When you say the trigger phrase, it will be expanded into the full text
dictionary_subtitle: Customize vocabulary, substitutions, and text expansions
dictionary_word_empty_subtitle: Add proper nouns, acronyms, and technical terms
dictionary_word_modal_description: The word will be used as a hint for Whisper.
dictionary_word_modal_hint: Tip: add proper nouns, acronyms, and technical terms.
home_transcription_confirm_delete: Delete this transcript and local audio?
home_transcription_retry_error_local_aud: Local audio is no longer available
home_transcription_retry_error_no_sessio: This transcription has no linked audio to retry
home_transcription_retry_no_audio: This transcript has no local audio to retry
home_unauth_subtitle: Transcribe your speech into formatted text with AI.
mic_selector_load_error: We couldn't get the available microphones.
notice_copied_accessibility_required: Copied — enable Accessibility to replace automatically
notice_notifications_enabled_body: Notifications enabled! You'll see alerts like this one.
notice_shortcut_in_use: Shortcut already in use or invalid
onboarding_congrats_card_code_title: Describe code in Cursor or Replit
onboarding_congrats_card_email_title: Full emails in Gmail or Outlook
onboarding_congrats_card_notes_title: Ideas and notes in Notion or Notes
onboarding_congrats_card_prompts_title: Prompts in ChatGPT, Cursor, or Windsurf
onboarding_congrats_card_writing_title: Articles and essays in Word or Substack
onboarding_congrats_subtitle: Use Shadow Whisper anywhere — press the shortcut, speak, release.
onboarding_dictation_body_suffix: to start. Release when you're done.
onboarding_dictation_footer: Shadow Whisper auto-formats lists, paragraphs, and punctuation
onboarding_dictation_line_1: I need to buy 3 things at the market
onboarding_done_subtitle: Shadow Whisper is running in the background. Open any app, press your shortcut, and speak.
onboarding_permissions_accessibility_des: To paste text in any field
onboarding_permissions_notifications_des: To warn when transcription can't be inserted
onboarding_plan_active_subtitle: Your plan is active — enjoy everything without limits.
onboarding_plan_expired_notice: Your trial period ended. You're on the free plan with a 2,000 words/week limit.
onboarding_plan_expired_subtitle: Subscribe to unlock unlimited transcriptions and transformations.
onboarding_plan_free_skip: Skip — continue on the free plan
onboarding_plan_free_subtitle: Free for 14 days — card required, only charged after the trial period.
onboarding_shortcut_caption: Hold to dictate · release to paste
onboarding_shortcut_subtitle: Use a combination with a modifier key (Cmd, Ctrl, Alt, Shift)
onboarding_skills_body: Skills are AI text transformations you can apply instantly. Use them during dictation — just describe the format you want — or select existing text and press a shortcut. Install skills and assign custom shortcuts in the Skills tab.
onboarding_skills_hint: Select text, press your skill shortcut, and the text is replaced instantly. You can assign shortcuts to each skill in Settings → Skills.
onboarding_welcome_subtitle: Shadow Whisper lives in your menu bar. You hit a shortcut, speak, and text drops where your cursor is. Before that works we need two permissions and a shortcut you actually like.
onboarding_welcome_title: Three quick steps and you're dictating everywhere.
pricing_page_subtitle: Manage your plan and monitor your usage
settings_general_mute_sublabel: Mutes system output while recording is active
settings_general_retention_sublabel: Allows reprocessing and replaying recordings for 7 days
settings_general_sounds_sublabel: Audio feedback on start, stop, cancel, and error
settings_languages_restore_sublabel: Restore detection for Portuguese and English
settings_languages_transcription_single: Fixed language — transcription forced to this language
edit_suggestion_dialog_subtitle: Adjust the word, replacement, and context before saving.
feedback_unmatched_toast: Could not match the transcript — try again right after correcting.
feedback_failed_toast: Could not analyze your correction. Please try again.
tour_step_home_history_body: Past recordings are saved locally. Reprocess audio or edit the generated text anytime.
tour_step_home_status_body: This header tracks your plan, weekly word count, and trial countdown.
tour_step_nav_affiliate_body: Invite others to ShadowWhisper and earn 30 days of Pro for free when your referral subscribes.
tour_step_nav_dictionary_body: Personalize vocabulary, substitutions, and text expansions so ShadowWhisper matches how you actually speak and write.
tour_step_nav_settings_body: Switch spoken language, browse docs, tweak shortcuts, and adjust advanced options in Settings.
tour_step_nav_skills_body: Write your own AI prompts to reshape text into new formats: emails, articles, summaries, code, translations — or whatever you dream up. Select any text and apply a skill instantly.
transforms_detail_custom_instructions_de: Extra instructions that complement the main prompt. Useful for fine-tuning tone, format, or constraints.
transforms_detail_custom_prompt_placehol: Instruction for the LLM to transform the text...
transforms_list_empty_subtitle: Create transforms to modify text automatically
transforms_new_prompt_placeholder: Instruction for the LLM. e.g. Rewrite the text in a formal tone keeping the original meaning.
transforms_new_subtitle: Create a custom transform to modify text with AI
transforms_polish_rule_flow_description: Rewrite sentences for more natural reading
transforms_polish_rule_professional_desc: Elevate the register for formal communication
transforms_polish_rule_structure_descrip: Group related ideas into logical blocks
settings_section_about_description: App info, help resources, and account options.
settings_section_account_description: Manage your profile, plan, and billing information.
settings_section_appearance_description: Personalize how ShadowWhisper looks on your Mac.
settings_section_languages_description: Configure the interface language and the languages recognized during transcription.
settings_section_learning_description: Let Shadow learn from your corrections to improve transcriptions over time.
settings_section_recording_description: Control how the app behaves during recordings, playback, and at system startup.
settings_auto_teach_description: When you correct a transcribed text, Shadow detects the change and offers to add the word to your dictionary.
settings_auto_teach_accessibility_warnin: Accessibility permission is required for Shadow to detect your edits in other apps.
settings_section_shortcuts_description: Configure global keyboard shortcuts. They work even when ShadowWhisper is in the background or minimized.
home_recording_card_subtitle: Start a new session and ShadowWhisper will transcribe and format the text for you.
home_upsell_subtitle: Unlimited transcriptions, AI transforms and more.
notifications_modal_empty_subtitle: We'll let you know here when there's something new.
shortcuts_modal_subtitle: Speed up your day with these keystrokes.
skills_subtitle: Browse and manage transformations you can run on your transcripts.
skills_empty_no_results_subtitle: Try clearing filters or changing language.
skills_empty_mine_subtitle: You haven't created any private skills yet.
skills_install_tooltip: Install this skill to activate it by voice. While recording, end a sentence with "use skill {displayName}" and Shadow Whisper will apply this transformation to what you said.
skills_installed_tooltip: This skill is installed. While recording, end a sentence with "use skill {displayName}" and Shadow Whisper will apply this transformation.
skills_not_found_subtitle: It may have been deleted or you do not have access to it.
skills_action_delete_confirm_description: This permanently removes the skill and its content. This action cannot be undone.
skills_preview_input_placeholder: Paste or write a sample to transform with this skill.
skills_preview_output_placeholder: The transformed text will appear here once you apply the skill.
skills_preview_apply_error: Couldn't apply the skill. Try again.
skills_preview_input_required: Type some text to preview the skill.
skill_builder_markdown_placeholder: You are rewriting a voice transcript as ...
skill_builder_empty_draft_helper: Write skill markdown on the left to see a preview here.
skill_builder_discard_confirm_body: You'll lose the draft. The skill won't be saved.
skill_builder_save_error_slug_exhausted: Could not allocate a unique slug. Rename and try again.
skill_builder_save_error_generic: Failed to save skill. Please try again.
skill_builder_test_subtitle: Record a phrase to see exactly what this skill will produce.
skill_builder_test_transcript_empty: Record a phrase to see the raw transcript here.

skill_builder_test_empty_hint: Build a skill first to test it
skill_builder_step_describe_subtitle: Tell us what you want the skill to do and we'll generate it for you.
skill_builder_step_describe_placeholder: e.g. Transform my voice notes into formal emails in Italian...
skill_builder_step_describe_build_failed: Generation failed. You can try again or build it yourself.
skill_builder_step_review_subtitle: Check the generated fields and adjust anything before saving.
skill_builder_done_subtitle: {name} is ready to use. You can pick it from the skill picker any time.
er_skill_not_official: Only official skills can be installed for voice invocation.
pricing_trial_notice: Free {days}-day trial. Card required, billed after trial.
pricing_plan_free_tag: For trying it, and for writers who dictate only when it really helps.
pricing_plan_pro_tag: The everyday driver. Unlimited dictation, full AI rewrite, everything in the app.
pricing_plan_byok_tag: Use your own AI provider keys. Pay only for the platform.
pricing_plan_feature_full_ai_rewrite: Full AI rewrite and tone modes
pricing_plan_feature_ai_cost_on_your_acc: AI cost on your own account
heatmap_others_tooltip: Apps not yet curated in the registry
badge_daily_1k_words_desc: Dictate 1,000+ words in a single day
badge_marathon_session_desc: Dictate 500+ words in a single session
badge_bilingual_desc: Dictate 100+ words in each of 2 languages
empty_home_hint: Hit the record button above to capture your first transcription. Your heatmap and stats will appear here once you've started.

share_card_copy_error: Couldn't copy the image. Check the permission and try again.
badge_daily_3k_words_desc: Dictate 3,000 words in a single day
badge_daily_5k_words_desc: Dictate 5,000 words in a single day
badge_omnichannel_desc: Use both desktop and extension on the same day
badge_celebration_omnichannel_subtitle: Desktop and extension in one day.
badge_rarity_footer: Rarity calculated over active users in the last 30 days. Updated daily.
action_mode_failed_notice: Action Mode failed. Nothing was inserted.
pill_action_mode_rate_limited: Too many actions. Wait a moment and try again.
onboarding_action_mode_title: Tell the AI what to do with any text
onboarding_action_mode_body: Select text in any app, press the Action Mode shortcut, and speak an instruction: "translate this", "answer this question", "rewrite it like a caveman". The result replaces your selection.
onboarding_action_mode_hint: No text selected? Your instruction becomes a prompt and the result is typed at your cursor.
settings_shortcuts_action_mode_descripti: Select text anywhere, press the shortcut, and speak an instruction like "translate this". The result replaces your selection; with nothing selected, it is typed at your cursor.
